name: ACS (International) Singapore
tagline: Methodist values, Anglo-Chinese heritage, world-class IB outcomes
description: ACS (International) Singapore is part of the prestigious Anglo-Chinese School family of Methodist institutions, with a heritage dating back to 1886. Located on the ACS Barker Road campus, the school serves approximately 1,000 students from Year 1 through Year 6 of secondary education. ACS (International) offers Cambridge IGCSE at Years 3-4 and the IB Diploma Programme at Years 5-6, consistently achieving outstanding IB results. The school blends academic excellence with strong Methodist character education, producing graduates well-prepared for top universities worldwide.

admission.process: ACS (International) admits students who demonstrate academic potential and character. Submit an application, then sit for an entrance test in English and Mathematics, followed by a student interview.
admission.deadlines: Applications open one year in advance. Main intake in January (Year 1) and July (other years).

faqs.question: Is ACS (International) the same as ACS (Independent)?
faqs.answer: No. ACS (International) is a private international school offering IGCSE and IBDP, while ACS (Independent) is a local secondary school under the MOE system. Both share the same Methodist heritage.

faqs.question: How are the IB results at ACS (International)?
faqs.answer: ACS (International) consistently achieves above-world-average IB Diploma results, with a typical average score above 35 points and many students scoring 40+.

seo.title: ACS International Singapore — IGCSE & IBDP Methodist School | EduAtlas
seo.description: ACS (International) Singapore: Anglo-Chinese School heritage since 1886. IGCSE and IB Diploma near Napier. Strong academic results. View 2026 fees and admission details.
